data.headline: Buy or Sell with Safari Homes
data.body: I'm Edward Rosado with Safari Homes Realty. Whether you're buying your first home or selling a property, I bring dedication and expertise to every transaction across Central New Jersey.
data.cta_text: Get Your Free Home Value Report

data.title: What I Bring to the Table
data.subtitle: Full-service real estate for buyers and sellers.

items.title: Free Home Value Report
items.description: Submit your info and get a personalized Comparative Market Analysis within minutes.

items.title: Personalized Home Search
items.description: Tell me your must-haves and I'll find listings that match before they hit the public market.

items.title: Se Habla Espanol
items.description: Bilingual service in English and Spanish.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three simple steps to get started.

steps.title: Submit Your Info
steps.description: Fill out the quick form below with your property details.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Selling? I'll send you a personalized Home Value Report. Buying? I'll reach out to learn more.

steps.title: Let's Connect
steps.description: We'll schedule a call to discuss your goals and next steps.

data.title: Ready to Make a Move?
data.subtitle: Selling? Get your free Home Value Report. Buying? Tell me what you're looking for.
data.description: Enter your details below and I'll get back to you right away. **100% free, no obligation.**

data.title: About Edward
bio: I'm Edward Rosado with Safari Homes Realty, serving Central New Jersey. I specialize in helping homeowners and buyers navigate the real estate market with confidence.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.body: {firstName} will reach out to you shortly. Keep an eye on your inbox!
thank_you.disclaimer: This home value report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
